mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collect (activityID, amount, description, initiatorID, targetUsers, createTime, CollectStatus) VALUES (#{activityID}, #{amount}, #{description}, #{initiatorID}, #{targetUsers}, #{createTime}, #{collectStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE collect SET amount = #{amount}, description = #{description}, initiatorID = #{initiatorID}, targetUsers = #{targetUsers}, CollectStatus = #{collectStatus} WHERE activityID = #{activityID}
UPDATE collect SET CollectStatus = #{collectStatus} WHERE activityID = #{activityID}
